headline: Barclays Updates Life Insurance Coverage, Lowers Prudential Financial (PRU) Target
summary: Prudential Financial, Inc. (NYSE:PRU) is included among the 15 Best Dividend Leaders to Buy Right Now. On March 11, Barclays lowered its price recommendation on Prudential Financial, Inc. (NYSE:PRU) to $119 from $124. It kept an Equal Weight rating on the shares. The firm said it adjusted targets across the life insurance group after reviewing […]
